name: com.requesttracker/mcp-server-rt
title: RT (Request Tracker)
description: Connect Claude to a live RT instance — search tickets, create and update tickets, add comments and replies.

environmentVariables.name: RT_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL of your RT instance (e.g. https://rt.example.com)

environmentVariables.name: RT_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: RT authentication token. Create one in RT under: Logged in as → Settings → Auth Tokens.
